metrics.finalAnswer:
The `packages/coding-agent/src/core/tools/` directory exposes **7 tools** total, organized into two default sets:

| Tool | Included in |
|------|-------------|
| `read` | `createCodingToolDefinitions()` + `createReadOnlyToolDefinitions()` |
| `bash` | `createCodingToolDefinitions()` only |
| `edit` | `createCodingToolDefinitions()` only |
| `write` | `createCodingToolDefinitions()` only |
| `grep` | `createReadOnlyToolDefinitions()` only |
| `find` | `createReadOnlyToolDefinitions()` only |
| `ls` | `createReadOnlyToolDefinitions()` only |

`createAllToolDefinitions()` bundles all seven. The "default" set for a coding agent (`createCodingToolDefinitions`) is **read, bash, edit, write** — 4 tools. Read-only mode swaps bash/edit/write for grep/find/ls.
